view.title: Goobta {id} Arag
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Ma hubtaa inaad dib u diri doonto iimaylka soo-dhawaynta?
view.emailSentMessage: Iimaylka soo-dhawaynta dib ayaa loo diray. Sanduuqaaga ka hubi.

buyIp.title: Ajaaniska IP Dheeraadka ah Iibso
buyIp.costDescription: Kharashka ({symbol}) bil kasta goobta marka la xisaabiyo
buyIp.confirmMessage: Kharashka IP dheeraadka: {symbol}{cost}/bil. Ma hubtaa inaad dalban doonto IP dheeraad ah?

migration.title: Goobtagaaga Guur
migration.registeredUsername: Magaca Isticmaalaha Diiwaan Gashan / Iimaylka / ID
migration.holdingPageQuestion: Haddii goobtu tahay goob nool/mashquul oo taaraafikada badan leh, ma samayn karnaa bogga sugidda inta lagu jiro guuritaanka?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Ma leedahay goobtan shuruudo gaar ah sida Nooca PHP / Modules?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Ma doonaysaa sidoo kale inaanu kaa caawino wareejinta diiwaangelinta magaca domain-ka?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Ma doonaysaa inaanu cusboonaysiino nameservers-ka isla markii aan xogta guuritaanka dhamayno?
migration.note1: Buuxinta foomkan waxay furi doontaa tigidhad cusub waaxda taageerada si ay u bilaabaan guuritaankaaga.
migration.note2: Fadlan noqo mid dhamaystiran oo sax ah oo suurta gal ah si aad uga fogaato wax kasta oo dib u dhac ah.
migration.note3: Guuritaanka caadiga ah wuxuu dhammaan doontaa 48 ilaa 72 saacadood gudahood. Marmar waa ka dheer tahay haddii xogta la koobiyo ay badan tahay.
migration.note4: Xisaabta martigelinta hore waa in ay noqotaa online oo la geli karo inta aan guuritaanka samaynayno, haddaan sidaas ahayn waxa laga yaabaa inaanu dhibaato la kulannno.
migration.note5: Fadlan ha samaynin cusboonaysiinno goobtagaaga inta aan guuritaanka samaynayno, haddaan sidaas ahayn xogtaas waxa laga yaabaa inaan la koobinuun martigelinta cusub.
